name: ecomm-payment-integration
description: A complete, fully functional, production-ready E-Commerce Web Application built with the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) featuring modern UI/UX design and payment gateway integrations.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
